name: utopia-ai-arch
description: Create and maintain the Claude Code `.claude/` layer (agents, skills, slash commands, hooks, refs, architecture log) for Utopia Flutter projects. Encodes the project-claude-layer blueprint plus the invariants and decision criteria distilled from production implementations (qbt, jolly, tlumu). Use when bootstrapping a new repo's AI architecture, adding a skill/agent/command/hook, recording a rejected alternative, auditing for drift, or evolving an existing `.claude/` layer.
